title: Verify Trial Corner Hub displays all 5 sections correctly
description: Test that clicking the trial widget/pill opens the Trial Corner with all required sections: Hero, Progress & Benefits, Engagement, Trending, and Manage Trial
preconditions: User is on homepage with trial widget visible

steps.description: 2. Wait for Trial Corner page to load

expected_result: All 5 sections (Hero with trial status, Progress & Benefits, Engagement with content, Trending shows, Manage Trial buttons) are displayed correctly
